Explore the fleet

    Type to search · ↑↓ to move · Enter to open · Esc to close

    Get cruise-ready.

    The adventure starts before you board. Pack like a regular, know your ship like an enthusiast, and step up the gangway ready for the best week of the year.

    116cruise giants profiled 25checklist items 248,663 GTthe biggest afloat
    The guides

    Before you sail

    The packing list

    The interactive checklist that remembers your progress — documents, clothing, health, cabin tricks, and the things everyone forgets.

    Start packing →

    First cruise? Read this

    Embarkation, the onboard account, gratuities, seasickness, dining — decoded honestly, no brochure gloss.

    Read the guide →

    Beat seasickness

    The cabin trick that matters most, wristbands, ginger, the horizon rule — how to prevent it and what to pack.

    Prevent it →

    Scared to cruise?

    Nervous about the sea, the motion, feeling trapped? A calm guide to overcoming the fear and seeing more of the world.

    Overcome the fear →

    Safe ashore & back on time

    Ship time vs local time, all-aboard, tender ports — stay street-smart ashore and never miss your ship.

    Port day rules →

    How big is a cruise ship?

    Bigger than the number sounds — see the giants at true scale against the Titanic, a football pitch, and you.

    See the scale →

    Captain — the ship game

    Take the wheel of sixteen real ships, from a harbour tug to Seawise Giant. Hunt treasure, bank it at port, and find out why draught decides everything. Free, no download.

    Take the wheel →

    The Silhouette Quiz

    Impress precisely one person at the sail-away party by naming every ship in the harbor from its profile.

    Test yourself →
    Know your ship

    The giants you can actually board

    Every cruise giant on this site — tap yours and know her better than the cruise director does.

    As an Amazon Associate, ships.fyi earns from qualifying purchases. Some links in our guides are affiliate links — if you buy through them we may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. It never changes what we recommend.

    LOAships.fyi

    The visual reference for ships. Sourced spec tables, every operator, and every giant of the sea drawn to true scale.

    aircraft.fyi luck.fyi calculate.to

Port safety Ships in storm The Silhouette Quiz Methodology Matchups Icon vs Titanic Legend vs Icon Titanic vs Queen Mary 2 Seawise Giant vs Icon Ever Given vs Ever Alot Emma Mærsk vs MSC Irina Blog The six days that stopped world trade Why the biggest ships stopped growing
    About the data. Every specification is compiled from operator, builder and registry sources and cited per row. Fleet and status figures are snapshots, marked ≈ where approximate and dated; individually verified figures carry a ✓. Ranks never mix units — cruise ships rank by GT, container ships by TEU, tankers by DWT. All silhouettes are original works of ships.fyi, drawn to true scale. Guides may contain clearly marked affiliate links; they never change what we recommend. Corrections and enquiries: business@luck.fyi — we fix errors visibly, not silently.
    © 2026 ships.fyi
    RecordsExplained
